nasb.text: They also brought barley and straw for the horses and swift steeds to the place where it should be, each according to his charge.

esv.text: Barley also and straw for the horses and swift steeds they brought to the place where it was required, each according to his duty.

cnv.text: 他們也各按各的職分供給拉車的馬和快馬吃的大麥和乾草，送到指定的地方。

ccb.text: 他们也各按其份提供喂马用的大麦和干草。
